name: AI UGC Pack - Webhook Pipeline v1

parameters.content:
# Setup Instructions
1) Send POST JSON to `/webhook/ai-ugc-pack-v1` (test URL first).
2) Required body fields: `product_name`, `product_description`, `audience`.
3) Optional: `request_id`, `pain_points` (array), `mechanism`, `guarantee`.
4) This starter workflow is deterministic and runnable without external APIs.
5) To upgrade quality, replace `Generate Hooks` + `Build Script` Code nodes with your LLM nodes.

# Production Upgrade Instructions
- Add a Data Store / DB check after validation using `dedup_key` to prevent duplicates.
- Add an Error Trigger workflow to log failed runs and alert Slack/Discord.
- Add a review queue (Sheet/DB) for human approval before publishing.
- Add per-node retries where available and keep logs of prompt + output.
